products.body:
Exclusive folding camp chair crafted with choice, kiln-dried white ash wood and backed with durable weather-resistant striped canvas. Clever nesting design, assembles and disassembles in seconds, making it easy to store and pack for all of your outdoor excursions.  Fabric stripe placement may vary for each chair due to the canvas pattern.

  • Durable nylon adjustable carrying strap
  • Dimensions 16"w x 24"d x 29"h
  • Supports up to 300 lbs
  • Chair weight - 9 lbs
  • Brass embossed logo badge
  • Made in the USA

* Eligible for FREE SHIPPING
products.title: Riverside Chair
